walkthru.name: Purchase Requisition to Goods Receipt — Buyer Guide
walkthru.description: Step-by-step in-app guidance for Purchase Requisition to Goods Receipt at Southeast Distribution Center

steps.title: Navigate to SAP Fiori Launchpad
steps.content: Open SAP Fiori Launchpad to begin your Purchase Requisition process.

steps.title: Search for Create Purchase Requisition App
steps.content: Type 'Create Purchase Requisition' in the search box to find the ME51N app.

steps.title: Click Create Purchase Requisition App
steps.content: Click on the 'Create Purchase Requisition' app tile to open the ME51N transaction.

steps.title: Select Purchase Requisition Type
steps.content: Select 'NB - Normally' as the Purchase Requisition type from the dropdown.

validation.error_message: Please select 'NB - Normally' as the PR type

steps.title: Select Purchasing Group - SE DC Restriction
steps.content: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: At SE DC, you must select either 'R-SE - Regional Southeast' or 'R-NAT - National'. This ensures compliance with regional supplier agreements and GlobalMart procurement policy.

validation.rule: Value must be R-SE or R-NAT
validation.error_message: SE DC is restricted to R-SE (Regional Southeast) or R-NAT (National) purchasing groups only

site_specific.site_rule: SE DC restricted to regional (R-SE) or national (R-NAT) supplier programs for compliance with regional supplier agreements
site_specific.enterprise_default: Enterprise default allows any valid purchasing group

steps.title: Select Purchasing Organization
steps.content: Select '2000 - GlobalMart Procurement - Southeast Region' as your purchasing organization.

validation.error_message: Please select '2000 - GlobalMart Procurement - Southeast Region'

steps.title: Enter Material Number
steps.content: Enter the material number for the item you want to requisition.
steps.element_description: Material Number field for line item 1

steps.title: Enter Quantity
steps.content: Enter the quantity needed for this requisition.

steps.title: Select Unit of Measure
steps.content: Select the appropriate unit of measure from the dropdown.

validation.error_message: Please select 'CS - Case' as the unit of measure

steps.title: Select Delivery Date
steps.content: Select the requested delivery date. For perishables, ensure compliance with lead time requirements.

steps.title: Select Plant
steps.content: Select 'SE-DC - Southeast Distribution Center (Atlanta, GA)' as the receiving plant.

steps.title: Select Storage Location
steps.content: Select the appropriate storage location for the material type.

steps.title: Enter Cost Center
steps.content: Enter the cost center for account assignment.
steps.element_description: Cost Center field for account assignment

validation.error_message: Please enter a valid cost center

steps.title: Enter Lot/Batch Number - SE DC Mandatory
steps.content: ⚠️ MANDATORY AT SE DC: Enter the lot/batch number for perishable items. This is required for food safety traceability per GlobalMart cold chain policy. Format: LOT-YYYY-MMDD-XX where XX identifies the processing facility.

validation.rule: Lot/Batch Number is mandatory for perishables at SE DC
validation.error_message: Lot/Batch Number is required for all perishable items at SE DC for food safety traceability

site_specific.site_rule: Lot/batch tracking is mandatory at SE DC for all perishable category items for food safety traceability per GlobalMart cold chain policy

steps.title: Enter GL Account
steps.content: Enter the General Ledger account for accounting assignment.
steps.element_description: GL Account field for accounting assignment

validation.error_message: Please enter a valid GL Account

steps.title: Save Purchase Requisition
steps.content: Click Save to create the Purchase Requisition. The system will display a PR number upon successful creation.
steps.element_description: Save button on PR creation form

completion.message: Purchase Requisition created successfully! You can now proceed with the approval workflow and subsequent goods receipt process.
completion.next_suggested: Purchase Order Creation and Goods Receipt Processing
